response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, demonstrated leadership in AI-agent infrastructure at Naver, and deep technical breadth across cloud, data pipelines, and open-source tooling — aligning well with core responsibilities. However, he lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years in production-grade AI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and his education is only a BS, missing the preferred advanced degree.
strengths: Proven experience in AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at Naver
Extensive cloud and data pipeline work with AWS, Docker, and real-time systems
Strong track record of technical leadership, mentoring, and open-source contributions
concerns: No clear documentation of 8+ years focused on production AI systems
Missing explicit experience with vector databases or RAG architectures
No advanced degree (Master’s/PhD) and limited evidence of LLM optimization or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph
